differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune myocarditis (e.g., giant cell myocarditis, sarcoidosis)
Drug-induced or supplement-induced hepatotoxicity with cardiac involvement
Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) with autonomic dysfunction
next_steps: Admit for continuous cardiac telemetry monitoring
Perform urgent echocardiography to evaluate for wall motion abnormalities, valvular disease, and ventricular function
Order Lyme disease antibody testing (ELISA with reflex to Western Blot)
Order additional cardiac markers including repeat high-sensitivity troponin and cardiac MRI
Initiate empiric intravenous ceftriaxone while awaiting infectious disease evaluation and testing results
Evaluate for medication-induced liver injury by discontinuing all herbal supplements
Review medication history for potential QT-prolonging or bradycardic agents
